class.name: FmodGeometryInstance3D
class.brief_description: A 3D node that automatically creates FMOD geometry for audio occlusion from MeshInstance3D or CollisionShape3D parents.
class.description: FmodGeometryInstance3D is a helper node that automatically generates [FmodGeometry] objects for 3D audio occlusion. When attached as a child of a [MeshInstance3D] or [CollisionShape3D], it creates collision geometry that blocks or attenuates sound between sources and listeners. Key features: - Automatic geometry generation from mesh or collision shape - Configurable occlusion parameters (direct and reverb occlusion) - Double-sided polygon support - Auto-rebuild on mesh changes (editor mode) - Debug gizmo visualization - Runtime geometry updates Usage: 1. Add FmodGeometryInstance3D as a child of a MeshInstance3D or CollisionShape3D 2. The geometry is automatically built when the node enters the scene tree 3. Adjust occlusion parameters in the inspector [b]Note:[/b] Geometry occlusion requires [constant FmodSystem.FMOD_INIT_FLAG_CHANNEL_LOWPASS] to be set during system initialization.

method.name: clear_geometry
method.description: Clears and releases the internal FMOD geometry object. This removes the occlusion effect but keeps the node in the scene tree. Emits [signal geometry_cleared] when complete.

method.name: detect_source_node
method.description: Manually triggers detection of the parent source node (MeshInstance3D or CollisionShape3D). This is called automatically when the node enters the tree, but can be called manually if the parent changes.

method.name: get_active
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the geometry is currently active and contributing to occlusion calculations.

method.name: get_auto_rebuild
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if auto-rebuild is enabled. When enabled, the geometry is automatically rebuilt when mesh properties change.

method.name: get_direct_occlusion
method.description: Returns the direct occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values block more direct sound between source and listener.

method.name: get_double_sided
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if polygons are double-sided. Double-sided polygons block sound from both directions.

method.name: get_geometry
method.description: Returns the internal [FmodGeometry] object. Returns [code]null[/code] if no geometry has been created.

method.name: get_reverb_occlusion
method.description: Returns the reverb occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values reduce the amount of reverb applied to occluded sounds.

method.name: get_show_debug_gizmo
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the debug gizmo is enabled for visualization.

method.name: has_valid_geometry
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if valid FMOD geometry has been created and is ready for use.

method.name: rebuild_geometry
method.description: Rebuilds the FMOD geometry from the source node. This clears any existing geometry and creates new polygons based on the current mesh/collision shape. Emits [signal geometry_rebuilt] and [signal geometry_created] when complete.

method.name: set_active
method.description: Enables or disables the geometry. When inactive, the geometry does not contribute to occlusion calculations.

method.name: set_auto_rebuild
method.description: Enables or disables auto-rebuild. When enabled, the geometry is automatically rebuilt when the source mesh changes (editor mode only).

method.name: set_direct_occlusion
method.description: Sets the direct occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). [code]0.0[/code] = transparent (no occlusion), [code]1.0[/code] = fully opaque. If auto-rebuild is enabled, the geometry will be rebuilt when this changes.

method.name: set_double_sided
method.description: Sets whether polygons are double-sided. If [code]true[/code], sound is blocked from both sides of the polygon. If auto-rebuild is enabled, the geometry will be rebuilt when this changes.

method.name: set_reverb_occlusion
method.description: Sets the reverb occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). [code]0.0[/code] = no reverb reduction, [code]1.0[/code] = full reverb reduction. If auto-rebuild is enabled, the geometry will be rebuilt when this changes.

method.name: set_show_debug_gizmo
method.description: Enables or disables the debug gizmo for visualization. The gizmo shows the geometry wireframe in the editor viewport.

members.member: Whether the geometry is active and contributes to occlusion calculations.
If [code]true[/code], automatically rebuilds geometry when the source mesh changes.
Direct sound occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values block more direct sound.
If [code]true[/code], polygons block sound from both sides.
Reverb occlusion factor (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values reduce more reverb.
If [code]true[/code], shows a debug gizmo in the editor viewport.

signal.name: geometry_cleared
signal.description: Emitted when the geometry has been cleared via [method clear_geometry].

signal.name: geometry_created
signal.description: Emitted when new geometry has been successfully created.

signal.name: geometry_rebuilt
signal.description: Emitted when geometry has been rebuilt via [method rebuild_geometry].
